---
title: SIP resources integrated in FIP
categories:
  - FIP Wizard
author: 
  - name: Barbara Magagna
    orcid: 0000-0003-2195-3997
date: 01-27-2026
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

![DSW](dsw.png) 

------------------------------------------------------------------------

The SIP service will be maintained for six months (until 31 July 2026) to facilitate the transition to the standard FIP service. After this period, SIP-based management will be phased out. Resources previously documented in a Semantic Interoperability Profile (SIP) are now included in a standard FIP (version 5 and later) as supporting declarations, enabling streamlined and consistent management.

Please use the [FIP Wizard](https://fip.fair-wizard.com/) going forward. Detailed migration instructions will be provided soon.

If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to us at fipadmin@gofair.foundation.
